locator.quote: PPO sees one number per race and CANNOT attribute a loss to the specific open

text: By default the env lumps all cash P&L onto the settle tick, so PPO sees one number per race and cannot attribute a loss to the specific open that caused it.

locator.quote: realised P&L — including force-close LOSSES (the mistakes), as a negative —

text: per_pair_reward_at_resolution=True credits each pair's realised P&L — including force-close losses, as a negative — at the resolution tick, per-pair, not lumped at settle.
